coordinate.origin: ground under the midpoint between feet in reference pose

compatibilityAliases._comment: Legacy shipping bone/socket name -> target v2 rig-contract name. Every hero root emitted by tools/assets/generate_assets.mjs carries this exact table in userData.rigAliases/extras so tooling and future Blender-authored assets can converge on the v2 contract without breaking existing stable clip/track names mid-migration.
compatibilityAliases.head: head

notes: Exact deformation bone names are locked during Wave 1 of docs/plan/character-graphics-animation-overhaul.md; this file is the single source of truth consumed by both the Blender export path and the repository-owned authored-recipe exporter.
Target approximately 50-64 deformation bones and no more than 80 total exported nodes per hero (plan §7.2).

The current authored-recipe exporter (tools/assets/generate_assets.mjs) ships the compatibilityAliases keys as the physically named, skinned, animated production skeleton (24 deformation bones) plus the sockets listed above, exported additively at identity/positive scale as non-deforming marker nodes.
No production hero socket, weapon mount, or marker may use negative scale (plan D9).
